description_long: This object is a rectangular stone relief embedded in a textured stone or concrete backing. The relief depicts three human figures in a classical style, with one figure reclining or lying down and two others standing, possibly engaged in a ceremonial or narrative scene. The frame around the relief is thick and architectural, with a projecting ledge at the bottom. The stone surface is light in color, with subtle variations and some signs of age or wear. The sides of the object are very thin compared to its height and width, indicating it is a shallow wall-mounted or embedded plaque. The overall craftsmanship and iconography suggest it is a decorative or commemorative element, likely intended for a public or historical urban setting.
description: A rectangular, classical stone relief plaque with three human figures, set in a thick, textured backing. The surface is light-colored and shows signs of age, with detailed sculptural work.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full relief scene with three figures and the architectural frame, highlighting the detailed sculptural work.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thinness of the relief and the depth of the sculpted figures, showing how little the plaque protrudes from the backing.
description_view_2: The rear view again displays the relief scene, but from a slightly different angle, emphasizing the recessed nature of the plaque within its backing.
description_view_3: The opposite side view confirms the shallow depth of the object and the slight protrusion of the relief from the backing.
attribute_location_context: historic building facade or commemorative urban monument
attribute_installation_method: embedded in masonry or concrete wall
attribute_weathering_pattern: Minor surface wear and discoloration, with some smoothing of details likely from age and exposure.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Visible relief carvings depicting human figures and architectural elements.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: embedded within a larger wall or structural backing
